title: [YTP] Super Smashed Bros POOP!!
description:
Wh-what the heck is this? What is going on? What kind of joke is this?

You don't have time to ponder such questions, as Link has just grabbed a Smash Ball.

Bam! Bam! BambambambamBAM!

You must recover!

It's enough to make a guy cry at the end.
